name: local-transcript
description: Desktop-only local speech-to-text for Obsidian with a Rust sidecar.

scripts.build: npm run build:sidecar && npm run build:frontend && npm run verify:build-output
scripts.check:js: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.check:rust: npm run build:sidecar && cargo fmt --manifest-path native/Cargo.toml --check && DOCS_RS=1 WHISPER_DONT_GENERATE_BINDINGS=1 cargo clippy --manifest-path native/Cargo.toml --all-targets --features engine-cohere -- -D warnings && cargo test --manifest-path native/Cargo.toml --features engine-cohere
scripts.check: npm run check:js && npm run check:rust
